objective: AUTO_FOLDER_REFACTOR_BUGFIND: visibility refactors under lib to expose hidden import/provenance/endpoint assumptions without changing public behavior except proven regressions.
completedSlices: Added replayable regression in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser_regression_test.dart for generic URL metadata with origin fallback.
Extracted _ConnectionImportCandidate in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser.dart to make candidate values and hasImportValues invariant explicit.
Fixed _importFromFields to include fallbackBaseUrl before the hasImportValues gate, preserving serverId/profileId for generic URL imports whose baseUrl comes from the URL origin.

Extracted platform connect-intent payload parsing from features/servers/setup/navivox_connect_intent_source.dart into features/servers/setup/navivox_connect_intent_payload.dart so String-vs-Map payload and source provenance mapping are pure/replayable.
Added features/servers/setup/navivox_connect_intent_payload_regression_test.dart; it failed before the fix for padded source tokens being downgraded to manual.
Fixed pairingHandoffSourceFromPlatformPayload to trim platform source tokens before provenance mapping.
Added core/protocol/endpoint/navivox_endpoint_uri_regression_test.dart to characterize endpoint origin derivation, websocket path/query preservation, and non-HTTP compatibility behavior.
Exposed endpoint origin formatting via private _navivoxOrigin helper so HTTP scheme remapping does not depend on Uri.replace port normalization.
Fixed navivoxHttpBaseUrlFromEndpointUri to preserve explicit default ports (for example wss://host:443 -> https://host:443) while mapping websocket schemes to HTTP schemes.

Added features/servers/shared/connection_gateway/presentation_regression_test.dart; it failed before the fix for bare IPv6 addresses and then for explicit default websocket ports being dropped by Uri.parse(...).toString().
Extracted _GatewayAddressPortInput plus authority/endpoint URI helpers in connection_gateway/presentation.dart to make address-to-URI and selected-port steps explicit.
Fixed connection gateway parsing so bare IPv6 address fields are bracketed for URI parsing and explicit default ports from URI-looking addresses remain visible in baseUrl.
Extracted active-gateway handoff host summary into SetupScreenPresentation.handoffHostSummary so confirmation-display URL formatting is pure and replayable.
Added features/servers/setup/setup_screen_presentation_regression_test.dart; it failed before the fix for bare IPv6 handoff summaries being rendered as ambiguous http://2001:db8::1:8765.
Fixed active-gateway confirmation summaries to bracket bare IPv6 hosts before appending a port.

Added features/servers/setup/navivox_connect_intent_source_regression_test.dart; it failed before the fix because isAvailable consumed a one-shot initialConnectIntent payload and initialImport invoked the platform method a second time.
Extracted NavivoxInitialConnectIntentPayloadCache in features/servers/setup/navivox_connect_intent_initial_payload.dart to make availability-probe replay explicit and independently characterized.

Fixed NavivoxConnectIntentSource so isAvailable caches the initialConnectIntent payload (including null) and initialImport consumes it once instead of re-querying a potentially one-shot platform intent.

Added appliesTopLevelJsonConnectionDefaultsToEntries regression in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser_regression_test.dart; it failed before the fix because JSON entry candidates dropped top-level base_url defaults.
Extracted _jsonCandidateMaps and _entryFieldsWithJsonDefaults in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser.dart to make JSON top-level defaults -> entry candidate data flow explicit.
Fixed JSON connection imports so entries inherit non-blank top-level defaults while preserving entry field overrides.

Added parsesSharedTextTokenWrappedInQuotes regression in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser_regression_test.dart; it failed before the fix for labeled non-nvbx tokens copied inside double quotes.
Extracted _skipTokenLeadingIgnoredChars plus token delimiter constants in features/servers/shared/connection_import/parser.dart to make labeled shared-text token boundary handling explicit.
Fixed shared-text connection imports so labeled quoted tokens such as Token: "shared_secret" preserve the token instead of returning a baseUrl-only import.

Extracted PairingHandoffManualEdit and pairingHandoffManualEditClearsImportedTarget in features/servers/pairing/pairing_handoff_manual_edit.dart to make manual edit provenance reset policy explicit and replayable.
Added features/servers/pairing/pairing_handoff_manual_edit_regression_test.dart for port-vs-token edit reset policy.
Fixed setup_screen port edits to clear imported handoff target/provenance just like address edits, preventing stale direct-app-open profile selection after manually changing the endpoint port.
nextCandidates: features/servers/shared/connection_import parser ranking tie-breaks for partial candidates with equal scores
features/servers/pairing token edit provenance policy at widget level if product decides credential edits should also clear pairing-link failure copy
validationReceipts: flutter test features/servers/pairing/pairing_handoff_flow_regression_test.dart (blocked by pre-existing missing lib/core/gateway/shared/contracts/navivox_gateway_text.dart import from navivox_gateway_message.dart; removed that attempted heavier test and kept pure Dart regression)
